result.summary: Hostinger exposes one public developer surface: a REST/OpenAPI Hostinger API requiring a bearer API token; plus an official CLI and MCP server that both use the same token.

hostinger_api_token.label: Hostinger API token
hostinger_api_token.setup: Go to the [API tokens page](https://hpanel.hostinger.com/profile/api) in Hostinger Panel and create a new token. Tokens are tied to your user account, inherit that user's permissions, and can optionally be set to expire.
